summary: Tested Reporte Operativo de Costura feature. All backend endpoints working correctly (15/15 tests passed after fixing minor data validation). All frontend UI components verified: KPIs display, table grouping by persona, expand/collapse, all 16 columns, filters panel, riesgo filter, avance inline editor, incidencia rapida dialog, open registro button.
features_verified: GET /api/reportes-produccion/costura returns correct data with kpis, items, and filtros
KPIs display correctly: costureros=1, registros=1, prendas=500, vencidos=0, criticos=0, sin_actualizar=0, incidencias=1
Table groups items by persona (Pepe Perez) with expand/collapse functionality
Each row shows all 16 columns: Corte, Modelo, Tipo, Entalle, Tela, Cant., Pend., Inicio, F. Esperada, Días, Avance, Últ. Act., D/s Act., Inc., Riesgo, Acciones
Avance inline editor works: click to edit, type value, Enter to save, Escape to cancel
Incidencia rapida dialog opens from + button with motivo select and comentario textarea
Filters panel toggles with Filtros button
Filter by riesgo works (Todos, Normal, Atención, Crítico, Vencido)
Open registro button present in Acciones column
Risk calculation: item with 1 incidencia_abierta has riesgo=atencion
Sidebar has 'Op. Costura' link under Reportes Producción section
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Risk calculation logic correctly handles incidencias, dias_sin_actualizar, and fecha_esperada
Avance inline editor uses optimistic UI update with toast feedback
Filters are applied both server-side (via query params) and client-side (via search)
Table uses expandable rows pattern for grouping by persona
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reporte Costura feature fully implemented and working. Test movimiento: id=kardex-pt-sync, persona=Pepe Perez, servicio=Costura, n_corte=01, cantidad=500, avance=35%, 1 incidencia abierta, riesgo=atencion. Remote PostgreSQL DB at postgres://admin:admin@72.60.241.216:9090/datos.
